concept.title: MVS subprojects
concept.shortdesc: MVS subprojects represent the programming resources that constitute a single load module. Subprojects that are created under the same remote system definition can share the system's properties. Subprojects that are defined under the same project can be built by using a single build command. MVS subprojects allow for working with multiple load modules under a single project construct.

conbody.p: MVS subprojects inherit their current property group from the remote system under which they are defined. If you change the current property group for the system or change property values in that property group, they are propagated to the MVS subproject. However, you can also assign a different property group to a project or subproject to differentiate its property values from the properties of the remote system.
The view provides an option to turn off file extensions for files in MVS subprojects. From the menu, click ShowMVS File Extensions .
